detectors.description:
Crowdsale.determineStatus() (Crowdsale.sol#873-903) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- endBlock == 0 (Crowdsale.sol#895)

Reentrancy in Crowdsale.devAllocation(address,uint256) (Crowdsale.sol#1077-1103):
	External calls:
	- require(bool)(totalTokensSent.add(_amount) <= token.totalSupply()) (Crowdsale.sol#1085)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- totalTokensSent += _amount (Crowdsale.sol#1095)
	Crowdsale.totalTokensSent (Crowdsale.sol#653) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Crowdsale.contribute(address) (Crowdsale.sol#1185-1257)
	- Crowdsale.determineStatus() (Crowdsale.sol#873-903)
	- Crowdsale.devAllocation(address,uint256) (Crowdsale.sol#1077-1103)
	- Crowdsale.finalize() (Crowdsale.sol#967-1017)
	- Crowdsale.returnWebsiteData() (Crowdsale.sol#855-867)
	- Crowdsale.totalTokensSent (Crowdsale.sol#653)

Reentrancy in [Crowdsale.devAllocation(address,uint256)](Crowdsale.sol#L1077-L1103):
	External calls:
	- [require(bool)(totalTokensSent.add(_amount) <= token.totalSupply())](Crowdsale.sol#L1085)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [totalTokensSent += _amount](Crowdsale.sol#L1095)
	[Crowdsale.totalTokensSent](Crowdsale.sol#L653) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [Crowdsale.contribute(address)](Crowdsale.sol#L1185-L1257)
	- [Crowdsale.determineStatus()](Crowdsale.sol#L873-L903)
	- [Crowdsale.devAllocation(address,uint256)](Crowdsale.sol#L1077-L1103)
	- [Crowdsale.finalize()](Crowdsale.sol#L967-L1017)
	- [Crowdsale.returnWebsiteData()](Crowdsale.sol#L855-L867)
	- [Crowdsale.totalTokensSent](Crowdsale.sol#L653)
